title: Optimize teaching adoption batch verification pipeline
perceive: Teaching adoption verification queue has accumulated ~150+ items pending integration. Context patch application and fingerprint calculation are not parallelized, creating a velocity bottleneck in framework teaching delivery.
execute: 1. Audit current teaching adoption flow in wakeup / closeout scripts. Identify where fingerprint calculation and Context Doc Patch application happen.
2. Profile adoption velocity: measure time-per-teaching and identify bottleneck (patch parsing, fingerprint calc, wai-context.md mutation).
3. Design batch verification harness: parallel fingerprint calc + context patch dry-run before mutex-gated atomic wai-context.md update.
4. Implement as optional teaching-batch-verify tool callable from wakeup; document in CLAUDE.md.
verify: Teaching adoption queue drains from 156 to <50 within one week. wai-context.md fingerprint updates are atomic and complete. No duplicate or missed teachings in adoption log.
acceptance_criteria: Batch verification reduces per-teaching adoption time by >40%
Teaching queue drains to acceptable backlog (<50 items)
All teachings in processed/ successfully adopt with correct fingerprints
